categories.name: High Potential
categories.description: Likely commercial or strategic opportunity requiring paid advisory response.

categories.name: Possible Potential
categories.description: Useful relationship or serious question, but buying intent is not yet clear.

categories.name: Low Potential
categories.description: Polite but not worth bespoke time unless later clarified.

categories.name: No Potential
categories.description: No commercial fit or time-wasting interaction.

manual_review_required_if: message mentions live project, budget, procurement, role or formal opportunity
sender appears to be CFO, Finance Director, ExCo member or transformation sponsor
message asks for speaking, media, partnership or board-level advice
message is sensitive, reputational, legal or personally complex
hard_rules: Never provide detailed consulting advice in LinkedIn messages
Always route valuable enquiries to the paid diagnostic
Always give low-fit enquiries a polite self-serve direction
